title: Unit 10: Ecosystems (iLearn Smart World 10)

dialogue.bot: Hi! Today we will talk about nature. Do you like spending time in nature, like forests or parks?
dialogue.expected: Yes, I do. I love walking in the park and breathing fresh air.

dialogue.bot: That's great! In your opinion, what is the most beautiful natural place in Vietnam?
dialogue.expected: I think Ha Long Bay or Cuc Phuong National Park is the most beautiful place.

dialogue.bot: Ecosystems are important. What do you think is the biggest problem for our environment today?
dialogue.expected: I think water pollution and air pollution are the biggest problems.

dialogue.bot: Many animals are losing their habitats. What should we do to protect wildlife?
dialogue.expected: We should stop cutting down trees and protect the forests.

dialogue.bot: Do you think we should use less plastic to help the environment?
dialogue.expected: Yes, we should. Using less plastic can reduce waste and protect animals.

dialogue.bot: Have you ever participated in a clean-up activity at your school or hometown?
dialogue.expected: Yes, I have. I helped pick up trash in my school yard last month.

dialogue.bot: If you could visit a national park, which one would you choose?
dialogue.expected: I would choose Ba Be National Park because it has a beautiful lake.

dialogue.bot: Final question: What is one small thing you do every day to save the Earth?
dialogue.expected: I always turn off the lights when leaving the room to save energy.

extra_questions: Are you interested in learning about different types of plants?
Do you think technology can help us protect the environment?
What is your favorite wild animal?
